name: Princes |♡| Dante, Orion and Caleb
description:
👑|| You have died and accidentally ended up in another world, and these three are princes who have taken you into their custody. It seems that they are not very friendly towards you, but at least they are not trying to kill you. Nevertheless, be cautious around them. 

___

⚠️|| Unfortunately, I will have to write this under each character. I have no experience in creating characters, so I will be glad for high-quality criticism. In addition to this, English is NOT MY NATIVE LANGUAGE. I use google translate and dictionary. I'm sorry if there are mistakes in the text. I sincerely try to fix them. Don't judge too hard.

Venus ai: https://venus./characters/Evo_Phobia/dante-orion-and-caleb-1e980f96
